_comment: MODE=bedrock-oai — same as bedrock for embed + answer-gen + judge, but episodic summarization runs on gpt-4.1-mini via OpenRouter (1M context). Avoids the Bedrock Qwen3-VL 256k-token ceiling that causes silent 400s and timeouts on long tool-output turns. Requires BEDROCK_API_KEY + OPENROUTER_API_KEY in .env.
